item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description: - Fixed modifier-click timing so modifier double-click actions no longer get swallowed by the first modifier click, while single-click modifier actions still execute correctly after the system double-click interval. - Restored reliable modifier toggle behavior for `Hide Others` and `Hide App`, including second-click undo/show-all handling and target-only unhide for `Hide App`. - Added `scripts/automated_modifier_toggle_checks.sh` to cover real Dock GUI regressions for modifier single-click and double-click action interactions.
